caption:
In Irish, *caillte* means "lost". We named the company after the one thing we kill.

Every missed call is a lost job — the caller just rings the next trade.
You can't answer the phone and be up a ladder at the same time. So we built the
receptionist that never sleeps: answers every call, books the job, takes the deposit.

Caillte = lost. CaillteAI = found.

Curious what missed calls are costing you? Free 60-sec audit — link in bio. 👇

#trades #plumberlife #electrician #ukandireland #missedcalls
